reason: A tight Texas border town’s buried past resurfaces when a stranger detective uncovers decades-old secrets.
A private eye peels back a small city’s water scandal, exposing long-buried corruption and shattered trust.
A lone investigator in a tiny Maine island town forces a community to face a dark family secret.
An outsider cop hides in an Amish village, and his presence unravels a hidden web of corruption.
In a small Minnesota town, a determined outsider cop tears at the fabric of a neighborhood’s deadly cover-up.
A corporate envoy’s arrival in a Scottish village cracks open a communal lie about their own paradise.
A big-city woman lands at a quirky rural farm, exposing repressed family secrets in real time.
An ex-con arrives in a remote Maine town, and her outsider status destabilizes long-held local pacts.
In a secluded Irish fishing village, a mysterious returnee upends legends and unearths hidden truths.
A young lawyer in a small Southern town takes on a powerful insurer and shatters the community’s uneasy pact.
